summary: Tested Family Plan tile in paywall grid and trial reminder email scheduler. Backend: 10/10 tests PASSED. Frontend: All UI features verified via Playwright - 6 plan tiles in 3x2 grid, billing toggle working, Family Plan section present in Settings.

issues: Family Plan appears as separate section below the 6-tile grid rather than as the 6th tile in the grid. SubscriptionPaywall.js has Family Plan as 6th tile in grid, but Settings page shows it differently.

passed_tests: POST /api/admin/trial-reminders/send requires admin role (403 for non-admin)
POST /api/admin/trial-reminders/send works for admin (returns {success: true, reminders_sent: int})
All 6 plan IDs present: premium, standard, base, new_adult, military, hospice
Plans have required fields: id, name, price, features
Paid plans have quarterly_price and annual_price with proper discounts
Military and Hospice plans marked with requires_verification: true
family_plan_enabled flag returned in plans API
Trial reminder scheduler runs as background task (visible in backend logs)
Backend startup includes trial_reminder_scheduler in lifespan
Billing toggle (Monthly/Quarterly/Annual) works correctly in Settings
Quarterly shows 10% off badge, Annual shows 20% off badge
Pricing updates correctly when billing toggle clicked
Family Plan section visible in Settings with pricing info
Trial banner shows '29 days left in your free trial' correctly
Admin beta mode toggle works (ON/OFF state persists)
critical_code_review_comments: SubscriptionPaywall.js correctly implements Family Plan as 6th tile in the paywall grid (data-testid='paywall-plan-family')
Settings page shows Family Plan as separate section - this is by design, not the paywall modal
trial_reminders.py correctly implements send_trial_reminders() with 10-day and 5-day reminder intervals
trial_reminder_scheduler() runs every 6 hours as background task
Lifespan in server.py correctly starts trial_reminder_scheduler alongside weekly_digest_scheduler
build_trial_reminder_email() generates proper HTML with urgency styling for 5-day vs 10-day reminders
context_for_next_testing_agent: Beta mode currently ON. Trial reminder scheduler runs every 6 hours - no users currently in 5/10-day reminder window. Family Plan tile is implemented in SubscriptionPaywall.js (line 396-446) as 6th tile in grid with data-testid='paywall-plan-family'. The Settings page shows a different layout with Family Plan as separate section below the 6-tile grid. All 6 subscription tiers working: Premium, Standard, Base, New Adult, Military, Hospice.

trial_reminders_api.note: Returns 0 because no users have trials expiring in 5 or 10 days

trial_reminder_scheduler.log_evidence: Trial reminder check — no reminders to send

note_on_family_plan_layout: The paywall modal (SubscriptionPaywall.js) has Family Plan as the 6th tile in a 3x2 grid layout. The Settings page displays subscription plans differently - showing 6 tiles in grid and Family Plan as a separate section below. This is by design as the paywall is for conversion and Settings is for management.
